title: French teen who licked vending machine straw faces jail in Singapore
summary_full: The teen, who posted on social media a video of himself licking the straw, could be jailed for more than two years.
summary_public: The teen, who posted on social media a video of himself licking the straw, could be jailed for more than two years.
